input.prompt:
[CONTEXT]: 诊断 HomeWorkspace.vue 中 agent 消息流式渲染时的滚动和动画问题。涉及 ScrollArea 组件、消息流 stream、自动滚动、淡入动画。

[GOAL]: 找到控制消息滚动行为的代码位置、流式渲染的动画实现、ScrollArea 的滚动触发逻辑，用于分析为何 stream 过程中不会平滑向上滚动以及淡入动画为何作用于整段而非新增片段。

[DOWNSTREAM]: 基于找到的实现代码，分析问题根因，确定哪些逻辑需要保留，哪些需要调整。

[REQUEST]: 
1. 在 src/components/HomeWorkspace.vue 中找：消息渲染逻辑、流式更新处理、滚动触发代码、reveal/fade 动画实现
2. 在 src/components/ui/ScrollArea.vue 中找：自动滚动逻辑、滚动行为配置、滚动触发条件
3. 在 tests/HomeWorkspace.spec.ts 中找：现有的滚动和动画相关测试用例
4. 搜索关键词：stream、scroll、fade、reveal、auto-scroll、scrollIntoView、animation
5. 跳过：无关组件、样式文件、配置文件

返回：文件路径 + 关键代码段描述（不需要完整代码，只需位置和功能描述）

486:     }

496: function hasStreamingRevealWork() {
497:   return messages.value.some((message) => {
498:     if (message.role !== "assistant" || message.status !== "pending") {
499:       return false;
500:     }
501: 
502:     const displayedText = streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
503:     const displayedReasoning = streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
504:     return (
505:       displayedText.length < message.content.length ||
506:       displayedReasoning.length < assistantReasoning(message).length
507:     );
508:   });

511: function recordRevealMetrics() {
512:   if (!streamDebugEnabled()) {
513:     return;
514:   }
515: 
516:   let pendingAssistantCount = 0;
517:   let maxTextBacklog = 0;
518:   let maxReasoningBacklog = 0;
519:   let currentTextBacklog = 0;
520:   let currentReasoningBacklog = 0;
521: 
522:   for (const message of messages.value) {
523:     if (message.role !== "assistant" || message.status !== "pending") {
524:       continue;
525:     }
526: 
527:     pendingAssistantCount += 1;
528:     const displayedText = streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
529:     const displayedReasoning = streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
530:     const textBacklog = Math.max(0, message.content.length - displayedText.length);
531:     const reasoningBacklog = Math.max(0, assistantReasoning(message).length - displayedReasoning.length);
532:     maxTextBacklog = Math.max(maxTextBacklog, textBacklog);
533:     maxReasoningBacklog = Math.max(maxReasoningBacklog, reasoningBacklog);
534:     currentTextBacklog = textBacklog;
535:     currentReasoningBacklog = reasoningBacklog;
536:   }
537: 
538:   updateStreamDebugReveal({
539:     pendingAssistantCount,
540:     maxTextBacklog,
541:     maxReasoningBacklog,
542:     currentTextBacklog,
543:     currentReasoningBacklog,
544:       revealLoopActive: streamRevealFrameId.value != null,
545:     autoScrollQueued: scrollQueued.value
546:   });
547: }

549: function runStreamingRevealFrame(timestamp: number) {
550:   const lastTimestamp = streamRevealLastTimestamp.value ?? timestamp;
551:   const elapsedMs = Math.max(8, timestamp - lastTimestamp);
552:   streamRevealLastTimestamp.value = timestamp;
553:   const shouldStickToBottom = isSubmitting.value || isTimelineNearBottom();
554:   let shouldAutoScroll = false;
555:   syncStreamingDisplayBuffers();
556: 
557:   for (const message of messages.value) {
558:     if (message.role !== "assistant" || message.status !== "pending") {
559:       continue;
560:     }
561: 
562:     const displayedText = streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
563:     const nextDisplayedText = revealAssistantText(displayedText, message.content, elapsedMs);
564:     if (nextDisplayedText.length !== displayedText.length) {
565:       streamFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = Math.max(
566:         displayedText.length,
567:         nextDisplayedText.length - STREAM_FADE_WINDOW_CHARS
568:       );
569:       streamFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] = (streamFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] ?? 0) + 1;
570:       shouldAutoScroll = true;
571:     }
572:     streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] = nextDisplayedText;
573: 
574:     const targetReasoning = assistantReasoning(message);
575:     const displayedReasoning = streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
576:     const nextDisplayedReasoning = revealAssistantReasoning(displayedReasoning, targetReasoning, elapsedMs);
577:     if (nextDisplayedReasoning.length !== displayedReasoning.length) {
578:       streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = Math.max(
579:         displayedReasoning.length,
580:         nextDisplayedReasoning.length - REASONING_FADE_WINDOW_CHARS
581:       );
582:       streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] =
583:         (streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] ?? 0) + 1;
584:       shouldAutoScroll = true;
585:     }
586:     streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] = nextDisplayedReasoning;
587:   }
588: 
589:   recordRevealMetrics();
590: 
591:   if (shouldAutoScroll && shouldStickToBottom) {
592:     queueScrollToLatestTurn("auto");
593:   }
594: 
595:   if (hasStreamingRevealWork()) {
596:     streamRevealFrameId.value = window.requestAnimationFrame(runStreamingRevealFrame);
597:     return;
598:   }
599: 
600:   streamRevealFrameId.value = null;
601:   streamRevealLastTimestamp.value = null;
602: }
603: 
604: function ensureStreamingRevealLoop() {
605:   syncStreamingDisplayBuffers();
606:   recordRevealMetrics();
607:   if (!hasStreamingRevealWork() || streamRevealFrameId.value != null) {
608:     return;
609:   }
610: 
611:   streamRevealFrameId.value = window.requestAnimationFrame(runStreamingRevealFrame);
612: }

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, nextTick, onBeforeUnmount, onMounted, reactive, ref, watch } from "vue";
import { storeToRefs } from "pinia";
import {
  ArrowUp,
  Brain,
  Bot,
  Check,
  ChevronDown,
  GitFork,
  History,
  LoaderCircle,
  RotateCcw,
  Square,
  UserRound,
  Wrench
} from "lucide-vue-next";
import type { ProviderReasoningEffort } from "@/types/provider";
import type { ChatMessage, ConversationCheckpointEntry, HistoryCheckoutMode } from "@/types/runtime";
import { useProviderStore } from "@/stores/providers";
import { useRuntimeStore } from "@/stores/runtime";
import { isTauriAvailable, safeInvoke } from "@/lib/tauri";
import Button from "@/components/ui/Button.vue";
import MarkdownRenderer from "@/components/MarkdownRenderer.vue";
import ScrollArea from "@/components/ui/ScrollArea.vue";

type TurnBucket = {
  turnId: string;
  user: ChatMessage | null;
  assistant: ChatMessage | null;
  tools: ChatMessage[];
};

type ComposerActionKind = "submit" | "resume" | "continue" | "restart";
type CheckpointRollbackAction = "transcript_only" | "transcript_and_workspace";

const runtimeStore = useRuntimeStore();
const providerStore = useProviderStore();

const {
  conversationCheckpointEntries,
  draftMessage,
  isSubmitting,
  latestExecutionCheckpoint,
  latestGraphRunSubmissionPlan,
  latestRunControlAuditSummary,
  messages,
  sessionOperation
} = storeToRefs(runtimeStore);
const { currentProvider, currentModel } = storeToRefs(providerStore);

const providerMenuOpen = ref(false);
const hoveredProviderId = ref<string | null>(null);
const reasoningMenuOpen = ref(false);
const showReasoningContent = ref(false);
const providerMenuRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);
const reasoningMenuRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);
const checkpointPickerMenuRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);
const forkSummaryMenuRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);
const timelineScrollAreaRef = ref<{
  scrollToBottom: (behavior?: ScrollBehavior) => void;
  viewportEl: HTMLElement | null;
} | null>(null);
const scrollQueued = ref(false);
const streamRevealFrameId = ref<number | null>(null);
const streamRevealLastTimestamp = ref<number | null>(null);
const stopRequested = ref(false);
const checkpointPickerOpen = ref(false);
const forkSummaryOpenForNodeId = ref<string | null>(null);
let lastMessageSignature = "";
const SHOW_REASONING_STORAGE_KEY = "pony-agent.ui.show-reasoning-content";
const streamDisplayTextByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, string>>({});
const streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, string>>({});
const streamRevealInitializedByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, boolean>>({});
const streamFadeStartByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, number>>({});
const streamFadeKeyByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, number>>({});
const streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, number>>({});
const streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId = reactive<Record<string, number>>({});
const STREAM_REVEAL_CHARS_PER_SECOND = 1600;
const STREAM_REVEAL_MIN_BATCH = 6;
const STREAM_REASONING_REVEAL_CHARS_PER_SECOND = 2200;
const STREAM_REASONING_REVEAL_MIN_BATCH = 8;
const STREAM_FADE_WINDOW_CHARS = 32;
const REASONING_FADE_WINDOW_CHARS = 56;
const AUTO_SCROLL_THRESHOLD_PX = 160;
const STREAM_DEBUG_STORAGE_KEY = "pony-agent.debug.stream-metrics";
let scheduledRevealMetricsPush = false;
let pendingRevealMetricsPatch: Record<string, unknown> | null = null;

function swallowAsyncError(result: unknown) {
  if (result && typeof result === "object" && "catch" in result && typeof result.catch === "function") {
    void result.catch(() => {});
  }
}

function streamDebugEnabled() {
  if (typeof window === "undefined") {
    return false;
  }

  return import.meta.env.DEV || window.localStorage.getItem(STREAM_DEBUG_STORAGE_KEY) === "true";
}

function updateStreamDebugReveal(patch: Record<string, unknown>) {
  if (!streamDebugEnabled() || typeof window === "undefined") {
    return;
  }

  const streamWindow = window as Window & {
    __ponyStreamMetrics?: Record<string, unknown>;
  };

  const current = streamWindow.__ponyStreamMetrics ?? {};
  const reveal = (current.reveal as Record<string, unknown> | undefined) ?? {};
  streamWindow.__ponyStreamMetrics = {
    ...current,
    reveal: {
      ...reveal,
      ...patch,
      updatedAt: Date.now()
    }
  };

  if (!isTauriAvailable()) {
    return;
  }

  pendingRevealMetricsPatch = {
    ...((streamWindow.__ponyStreamMetrics.reveal as Record<string, unknown> | undefined) ?? {})
  };
  if (scheduledRevealMetricsPush) {
    return;
  }

  scheduledRevealMetricsPush = true;
  window.setTimeout(() => {
    scheduledRevealMetricsPush = false;
    const payload = pendingRevealMetricsPatch;
    pendingRevealMetricsPatch = null;
    if (!payload) {
      return;
    }

    swallowAsyncError(safeInvoke("record_stream_debug_metrics", {
      section: "reveal",
      payload
    }));
  }, 250);
}

const currentModelSupportsReasoning = computed(
  () => currentModel.value?.capabilities?.supportsReasoning ?? false
);

const providerLabel = computed(() => {
  const providerName = currentProvider.value?.name?.trim();
  const modelName = currentModel.value?.name?.trim();

  if (providerName && modelName) {
    return `${providerName}/${modelName}`;
  }

  if (providerName) {
    return providerName;
  }

  return "选择 provider/model";
});

const reasoningTriggerTitle = computed(() => {
  if (!currentModel.value) {
    return "当前未选择模型";
  }

  if (!currentModelSupportsReasoning.value) {
    return "当前模型不支持思考强度，可继续设置是否显示思考";
  }

  return "选择思考强度与思考显示方式";
});

const reasoningLabel = computed(() => {
  if (!currentModel.value) {
    return "思考 --";
  }

  if (!currentModelSupportsReasoning.value) {
    return "思考 不支持";
  }

  return providerStore.currentReasoningEffort

const composerAction = computed<{
  kind: ComposerActionKind;
  label: string;
  hint: string;
}>(() => {
  const actionSummary = latestRunControlAuditSummary.value?.actionEvidenceSummary ?? null;
  const planCommand = latestGraphRunSubmissionPlan.value?.command?.trim().toLowerCase() || null;
  const checkpointCommand = latestExecutionCheckpoint.value?.submissionCommand?.trim().toLowerCase() || null;
  const projectedCommand = actionSummary?.projectedCommand?.trim().toLowerCase() || null;
  const command = projectedCommand || planCommand || checkpointCommand;
  const checkpoint = latestExecutionCheckpoint.value;

  if (actionSummary?.commandKind === "stop_graph_run" && actionSummary.summary.trim()) {
    return {
      kind: "resume",
      label: "恢复",
      hint: actionSummary.summary.trim()
    };
  }

  if (command === "resume_graph_run_stream") {
    return {
      kind: "resume",
      label: "恢复",
      hint: actionSummary?.summary?.trim() || "检测到暂停中的运行；点击后会恢复该 run 并继续执行。"
    };
  }

  if (command === "continue_graph_run_stream") {
    return {
      kind: "continue",
      label: "继续",
      hint: actionSummary?.summary?.trim() || "检测到可继续的 graph run；点击后会接着当前运行推进。"
    };
  }

  if (
    actionSummary?.startReason === "replay_from_checkpoint" ||
    actionSummary?.startReason === "restart_from_checkpoint" ||
    actionSummary?.degraded ||
    checkpoint?.recoveryMode === "replay_required" ||
    checkpoint?.checkpointKind === "lifecycle_boundary" ||
    (command === "start_graph_run_stream" &&
      latestGraphRunSubmissionPlan.value?.source?.trim().toLowerCase() === "checkpoint")
  ) {
    return {
      kind: "restart",
      label: "重新开始",
      hint: actionSummary?.summary?.trim() || "当前恢复点只保留持久化事实；点击后会重新开始新的执行。"
    };
  }

  return {
    kind: "submit",
    label: "发送",
    hint: "输入消息后开始新一轮执行。"
  };
});

const turns = computed<TurnBucket[]>(() => {
  const buckets = new Map<string, TurnBucket>();

  for (const message of messages.value) {
    const bucket = buckets.get(message.turnId) ?? {
      turnId: message.turnId,
      user: null,
      assistant: null,
      tools: []
    };

    if (message.role === "user") {
      bucket.user = message;
    } else if (message.role === "assistant") {
      bucket.assistant = message;
    } else if (message.toolName || message.detail || message.content) {
      bucket.tools.push(message);
    }

    buckets.set(message.turnId, bucket);
  }

  return Array.from(buckets.values());
});

const latestTurnSignature = computed(() => {
  const latestMessage = messages.value[messages.value.length - 1] ?? null;
  const latestTurnId = latestMessage?.turnId ?? "";
  if (!latestTurnId) {
    return "";
  }

  const parts: string[] = [];
  for (let index = messages.value.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
    const message = messages.value[index]!;
    if (message.turnId !== latestTurnId) {
      break;
    }
    parts.push(
      `${message.id}:${message.content.length}:${message.reasoningContent?.length ?? ""}:${message.status ?? ""}:${message.tokenCount ?? ""}`
    );
  }

  return parts.reverse().join("|");
});

function revealStreamText(
  current: string,
  target: string,
  elapsedMs: number,
  charsPerSecond: number,
  minBatch: number,
  catchUpDivisor: number
) {
  if (current.length >= target.length) {
    return target;
  }

  const remaining = target.length - current.length;
  const baseStep = Math.max(minBatch, Math.round((charsPerSecond * elapsedMs) / 1000));
  const catchUpStep = Math.ceil(remaining / catchUpDivisor);
  const nextLength = Math.min(target.length, current.length + Math.max(baseStep, catchUpStep));
  return target.slice(0, nextLength);
}

function revealAssistantText(current: string, target: string, elapsedMs: number) {
  return revealStreamText(current, target, elapsedMs, STREAM_REVEAL_CHARS_PER_SECOND, STREAM_REVEAL_MIN_BATCH, 4);
}

function revealAssistantReasoning(current: string, target: string, elapsedMs: number) {
  return revealStreamText(
    current,
    target,
    elapsedMs,
    STREAM_REASONING_REVEAL_CHARS_PER_SECOND,
    STREAM_REASONING_REVEAL_MIN_BATCH,
    4
  );
}

function syncStreamingDisplayBuffers() {
  const activeMessageIds = new Set<string>();

  for (const message of messages.value) {
    if (message.role !== "assistant") {
      continue;
    }

    activeMessageIds.add(message.id);
    const messageReasoning = assistantReasoning(message);

    if (message.status !== "pending") {
      streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] = message.content;
      streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] = messageReasoning;
      streamFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = message.content.length;
      streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = messageReasoning.length;
      continue;
    }

    if (!(message.id in streamDisplayTextByMessageId)) {
      streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] = "";
      streamRevealInitializedByMessageId[message.id] = true;
    } else if (streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id]!.length > message.content.length) {
      streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] = message.content;
      streamFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = message.content.length;
    }
    if (!(message.id in streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId)) {
      streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] = "";
    } else if (streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id]!.length > messageReasoning.length) {
      streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] = messageReasoning;
      streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = messageReasoning.length;
    }
    if (!(message.id in streamFadeStartByMessageId)) {
      streamFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = 0;
    }
    if (!(message.id in streamFadeKeyByMessageId)) {
      streamFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] = 0;
    }
    if (!(message.id in streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId)) {
      streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = 0;
    }
    if (!(message.id in streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId)) {
      streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] = 0;
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamDisplayTextByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamDisplayTextByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamRevealInitializedByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamRevealInitializedByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamFadeStartByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamFadeStartByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamFadeKeyByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamFadeKeyByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }

  for (const messageId of Object.keys(streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId)) {
    if (!activeMessageIds.has(messageId)) {
      delete streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId[messageId];
    }
  }
}

function hasStreamingRevealWork() {
  return messages.value.some((message) => {
    if (message.role !== "assistant" || message.status !== "pending") {
      return false;
    }

    const displayedText = streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
    const displayedReasoning = streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
    return (
      displayedText.length < message.content.length ||
      displayedReasoning.length < assistantReasoning(message).length
    );
  });
}

function recordRevealMetrics() {
  if (!streamDebugEnabled()) {
    return;
  }

  let pendingAssistantCount = 0;
  let maxTextBacklog = 0;
  let maxReasoningBacklog = 0;
  let currentTextBacklog = 0;
  let currentReasoningBacklog = 0;

  for (const message of messages.value) {
    if (message.role !== "assistant" || message.status !== "pending") {
      continue;
    }

    pendingAssistantCount += 1;
    const displayedText = streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
    const displayedReasoning = streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
    const textBacklog = Math.max(0, message.content.length - displayedText.length);
    const reasoningBacklog = Math.max(0, assistantReasoning(message).length - displayedReasoning.length);
    maxTextBacklog = Math.max(maxTextBacklog, textBacklog);
    maxReasoningBacklog = Math.max(maxReasoningBacklog, reasoningBacklog);
    currentTextBacklog = textBacklog;
    currentReasoningBacklog = reasoningBacklog;
  }

  updateStreamDebugReveal({
    pendingAssistantCount,
    maxTextBacklog,
    maxReasoningBacklog,
    currentTextBacklog,
    currentReasoningBacklog,
      revealLoopActive: streamRevealFrameId.value != null,
    autoScrollQueued: scrollQueued.value
  });
}

function runStreamingRevealFrame(timestamp: number) {
  const lastTimestamp = streamRevealLastTimestamp.value ?? timestamp;
  const elapsedMs = Math.max(8, timestamp - lastTimestamp);
  streamRevealLastTimestamp.value = timestamp;
  const shouldStickToBottom = isSubmitting.value || isTimelineNearBottom();
  let shouldAutoScroll = false;
  syncStreamingDisplayBuffers();

  for (const message of messages.value) {
    if (message.role !== "assistant" || message.status !== "pending") {
      continue;
    }

    const displayedText = streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
    const nextDisplayedText = revealAssistantText(displayedText, message.content, elapsedMs);
    if (nextDisplayedText.length !== displayedText.length) {
      streamFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = Math.max(
        displayedText.length,
        nextDisplayedText.length - STREAM_FADE_WINDOW_CHARS
      );
      streamFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] = (streamFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] ?? 0) + 1;
      shouldAutoScroll = true;
    }
    streamDisplayTextByMessageId[message.id] = nextDisplayedText;

    const targetReasoning = assistantReasoning(message);
    const displayedReasoning = streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] ?? "";
    const nextDisplayedReasoning = revealAssistantReasoning(displayedReasoning, targetReasoning, elapsedMs);
    if (nextDisplayedReasoning.length !== displayedReasoning.length) {
      streamReasoningFadeStartByMessageId[message.id] = Math.max(
        displayedReasoning.length,
        nextDisplayedReasoning.length - REASONING_FADE_WINDOW_CHARS
      );
      streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] =
        (streamReasoningFadeKeyByMessageId[message.id] ?? 0) + 1;
      shouldAutoScroll = true;
    }
    streamDisplayReasoningByMessageId[message.id] = nextDisplayedReasoning;
  }

  recordRevealMetrics();

  if (shouldAutoScroll && shouldStickToBottom) {
    queueScrollToLatestTurn("auto");
  }

  if (hasStreamingRevealWork()) {
    streamRevealFrameId.value = window.requestAnimationFrame(runStreamingRevealFrame);
    return;
  }

  streamRevealFrameId.value = null;
  streamRevealLastTimestamp.value = null;
}

function ensureStreamingRevealLoop() {
  syncStreamingDisplayBuffers();
  recordRevealMetrics();
  if (!hasStreamingRevealWork() || streamRevealFrameId.value != null) {
    return;
  }

  streamRevealFrameId.value = window.requestAnimationFrame(runStreamingRevealFrame);
}

function messageCheckpointActionTitle(

) {
  if (action === "transcript_only") {
    if (isSubmitting.value) {
      return "运行中暂不可回退 checkpoint（仅对话）";
    }
    if (sessionOperation.value) {
      return "当前正在处理会话操作，暂不可回退 checkpoint（仅对话）";
    }
    return "回到此 checkpoint（仅对话）";
  }

  if (isSubmitting.value) {
    return "运行中暂不可回退 checkpoint（对话 + 文件）";
  }
  if (sessionOperation.value) {
    return "当前正在处理会话操作，暂不可回退 checkpoint（对话 + 文件）";
  }
  if (!entry.workspaceRollbackCapable) {
    return "该 checkpoint 不支持文件回退，将仅恢复对话历史";
  }
  return "回到此 checkpoint（对话 + 文件）";
}

async function jumpToForkTarget(
  entry: ConversationCheckpointEntry,
  target: ConversationCheckpointEntry["forkTargets"][number]
) {
  forkSummaryOpenForNodeId.value = null;

  if (target.branchId && !target.isActive) {
    const switched = await runtimeStore.switchHistoryBranch(target.branchId);
    if (switched?.visibleNodeId === target.nodeId || switched?.branchHeadNodeId === target.nodeId) {
      return;
    }
  }

  await runtimeStore.checkoutHistoryNode(target.nodeId, checkpointModeForPickerEntry(entry));
}

function handleCheckpointShortcut(event: KeyboardEvent) {
  const isMac = typeof navigator !== "undefined" && navigator.platform.toLowerCase().includes("mac");
  const shortcutPressed = event.key.toLowerCase() === "k" && (isMac ? event.metaKey : event.ctrlKey);

  if (shortcutPressed && !event.shiftKey && !event.altKey) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (checkpointPickerEntries.value.length > 0) {
      checkpointPickerOpen.value = true;
      providerMenuOpen.value = false;
      hoveredProviderId.value = null;
      reasoningMenuOpen.value = false;
      forkSummaryOpenForNodeId.value = null;
    }
    return true;
  }

  return false;
}

function handleComposerKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent) {
  if (handleCheckpointShortcut(event)) {
    return;
  }

  if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (!isSubmitting.value) {
      runtimeStore.submitTurn();
    }
  }
}

function handleWindowKeydown(event: KeyboardEvent) {
  const target = event.target as HTMLElement | null;
  const isEditableTarget =
    target instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement ||
    target instanceof HTMLInputElement ||
    target?.isContentEditable === true;

  if (isEditableTarget && target !== document.activeElement) {
    return;
  }

  handleCheckpointShortcut(event);
}

  if (providerMenuRef.value && target && !providerMenuRef.value.contains(target)) {
    providerMenuOpen.value = false;
    hoveredProviderId.value = null;
  }

  if (reasoningMenuRef.value && target && !reasoningMenuRef.value.contains(target)) {
    reasoningMenuOpen.value = false;
  }

  if (checkpointPickerMenuRef.value && target && !checkpointPickerMenuRef.value.contains(target)) {

  if (forkSummaryMenuRef.value && target && !forkSummaryMenuRef.value.contains(target)) {
    forkSummaryOpenForNodeId.value = null;
  }

function isTimelineNearBottom() {
  const viewport = timelineScrollAreaRef.value?.viewportEl ?? null;
  if (!viewport) {
    return true;
  }

  const distanceToBottom = viewport.scrollHeight - viewport.scrollTop - viewport.clientHeight;
  return distanceToBottom <= AUTO_SCROLL_THRESHOLD_PX;
}

function queueScrollToLatestTurn(behavior: ScrollBehavior = "smooth") {
  if (scrollQueued.value) {
    return;
  }

  scrollQueued.value = true;
  void nextTick().then(() => {
    scrollQueued.value = false;
    const scrollArea = timelineScrollAreaRef.value;
    if (scrollArea && typeof scrollArea.scrollToBottom === "function") {
      scrollArea.scrollToBottom(behavior);
    } else {
      const viewport = scrollArea?.viewportEl ?? null;
      if (viewport) {
        viewport.scrollTo({
          top: viewport.scrollHeight,
          behavior
        });
      }
    }

    updateStreamDebugReveal({
      scrolledToBottom: true,
      scrollBehavior: behavior,
      nearBottom: isTimelineNearBottom()
    });
  });
}

onMounted(() => {
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    showReasoningContent.value = window.localStorage.getItem(SHOW_REASONING_STORAGE_KEY) === "true";
  }
  syncStreamingDisplayBuffers();
  window.addEventListener("click", handleClickOutside);
  window.addEventListener("keydown", handleWindowKeydown);
  queueScrollToLatestTurn("auto");
});

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  window.removeEventListener("click", handleClickOutside);
  window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleWindowKeydown);
  if (streamRevealFrameId.value != null) {
    window.cancelAnimationFrame(streamRevealFrameId.value);
  }
});

watch(latestTurnSignature, (signature) => {
  ensureStreamingRevealLoop();
  const behavior: ScrollBehavior =
    signature.startsWith(lastMessageSignature) && lastMessageSignature.length > 0
      ? "auto"
      : "smooth";
  const shouldStickToBottom = isSubmitting.value || isTimelineNearBottom();

  lastMessageSignature = signature;
  if (shouldStickToBottom) {
    queueScrollToLatestTurn(behavior);
  }
}, { flush: "post" });

watch(showReasoningContent, (value) => {
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    window.localStorage.setItem(SHOW_REASONING_STORAGE_KEY, value ? "true" : "false");
  }
});

watch(isSubmitting, (submitting) => {
  ensureStreamingRevealLoop();
  if (!submitting) {
    stopRequested.value = false;
  }
});

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, ref, type HTMLAttributes } from "vue";
import { ScrollAreaCorner, ScrollAreaRoot, ScrollAreaViewport } from "reka-ui";
import ScrollBar from "@/components/ui/ScrollBar.vue";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const props = defineProps<{
  class?: HTMLAttributes["class"];
  viewportClass?: HTMLAttributes["class"];
}>();

const rootClassName = computed(() => cn("relative overflow-hidden", props.class));
const viewportClassName = computed(() => cn("h-full w-full rounded-[inherit]", props.viewportClass));

const viewportEl = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);

function scrollToBottom(behavior: ScrollBehavior = "smooth") {
  if (!viewportEl.value) {
    return;
  }

  viewportEl.value.scrollTo({
    top: viewportEl.value.scrollHeight,
    behavior
  });
}

defineExpose({
  viewportEl,
  scrollToBottom
});
</script>

<template>
  <ScrollAreaRoot :class="rootClassName">
    <ScrollAreaViewport ref="viewportEl" :class="viewportClassName">
      <slot />
    </ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollBar orientation="vertical" />
    <ScrollAreaCorner class="bg-transparent" />
  </ScrollAreaRoot>
</template>
